mapper.select: SELECT * FROM activity ORDER BY start_time DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO activity (title, description, type, start_time, end_time, vote_count, vote_limit) VALUES (#{title}, #{description}, #{type}, #{startTime}, #{endTime}, #{voteCount}, #{voteLimit})
mapper.update: UPDATE activity SET vote_count = vote_count + 1 WHERE activity_id = #{activityId}
mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT group_name FROM activity_registration WHERE activity_id = #{activityId} AND group_name IS NOT NULL AND group_name != ''
SELECT group_name as groupName, COUNT(*) as memberCount FROM activity_registration WHERE activity_id = #{activityId} AND group_name IS NOT NULL AND group_name != '' GROUP BY group_name
